findings.description: The Java code example under「設定した値を取得する実装例」is absent. This example shows that the `${hello.message}` placeholder is resolved to the actual value from the environment config file (`This is Hello Message!!`) when the component is retrieved at runtime — a useful behavioral clarification.

Section s4 content uses `SystemRepository.getObject(...)` to retrieve both the parent and nested components, but `SystemRepository` is absent from the hints array. Users looking for how to retrieve nested components via SystemRepository would not be routed to this section.
